summary: Documented manual per-app language testing for newer iOS while preserving the boundary that automated locale smoke uses launch arguments. Added Settings > Apps > Owlory > Language instructions, fallback through Settings > General > Language & Region > Add Language, and explicit manual/TestFlight-only scope.

contract_status_changes.before: Docs described automated locale launch smoke but did not explain manual per-app language switching for TestFlight/device review.
contract_status_changes.after: Docs distinguish manual/TestFlight per-app language testing from deterministic automated locale smoke.

residual_risks: Manual Settings-based language switching depends on the installed iOS build and whether iOS exposes multiple supported app languages.
This slice does not prove translation quality, layout correctness, or packaged-resource behavior.
next_recommended_reason: Clean stop is valid unless localization review or UI regression expansion becomes active.

source_reference.title: Apple Support: Change the language on your iPhone or iPad
